metadata.title: Why the Hot Ones Are Jerks
metadata.thing: a scatter cloud of tiny faces with two red cut lines
_variant_todo: rewrite every beat narration_text in the Teardown register (voices/teardown/VOICE.md + CLAUDE-BRAND.md) — voice only, facts unchanged
signature tangent 0-1 per video, ONLY on a clear opportunity (see SKILL)
swap the outro to the Claude outro from AUTHOR.MD :: NikBearBrown
then build audience-namespaced (audio in the new voice, scenes in the new palette)

skin_warnings: NO RENDERABLE BEATS: no beat carries a shot.remotion.pattern or Manim annotation — the pipeline will render NOTHING and every slot becomes a YOU-slate. The sheet was authored without the scene contract.
INTRO: palette=claude but the cold open is 'un-annotated' — COLD OPEN LAW wants ClaudeComposerAsk
A22: palette=claude but the outro is 'un-annotated' — OUTRO LAW wants ClaudeTitleOutro

beats.narration_text:
This is Liam, in for Bear. Bear's Doodles

Why the Hot Ones Are Jerks
beats.tts_normalized_text:
Bear's Doodles

Why the Hot Ones Are Jerks
beats.new_visual_element: title card (thing + title in Shadows Into Light)

build.suggested: suggested prompt: title card (thing + title in Shadows Into Light)

beats.narration_text: Everyone you date seems to prove it: the more attractive someone is, the meaner they are.
beats.tts_normalized_text: Everyone you date seems to prove it: the more attractive someone is, the meaner they are.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Everyone you date seems to prove it: the more attractive someone is, the meaner they are.

beats.narration_text: Two axes hold every person you could ever meet.
beats.tts_normalized_text: Two axes hold every person you could ever meet.
beats.new_visual_element: bare x/y axes, ink

build.suggested: suggested prompt: bare x/y axes, ink

beats.narration_text: Sideways measures how attractive they are.
beats.tts_normalized_text: Sideways measures how attractive they are.
beats.new_visual_element: handwritten x-axis label 'attractive' with small arrow

build.suggested: suggested prompt: handwritten x-axis label 'attractive' with small arrow

beats.narration_text: Upward measures how nice they are.
beats.tts_normalized_text: Upward measures how nice they are.
beats.new_visual_element: handwritten y-axis label 'nice' with small arrow

build.suggested: suggested prompt: handwritten y-axis label 'nice' with small arrow

beats.narration_text: A cloud of dots fills the space evenly, one dot per person.
beats.tts_normalized_text: A cloud of dots fills the space evenly, one dot per person.
beats.new_visual_element: uncorrelated dot cloud (~120 ink dots, seeded RNG so every render matches)

build.suggested: suggested prompt: uncorrelated dot cloud (~120 ink dots, seeded RNG so every render matches)

beats.narration_text: A flat trend line through the cloud says looks and kindness are unrelated.
beats.tts_normalized_text: A flat trend line through the cloud says looks and kindness are unrelated.
beats.new_visual_element: flat trend line, accent color, drawn left to right

build.suggested: suggested prompt: flat trend line, accent color, drawn left to right

beats.narration_text: Here is that cloud again, now as your dating pool.
beats.tts_normalized_text: Here is that cloud again, now as your dating pool.
beats.new_visual_element: axes + cloud redrawn as one composite (fresh white canvas, same RNG seed as scene 1)

build.suggested: suggested prompt: axes + cloud redrawn as one composite (fresh white canvas, same RNG seed as scene 1)

beats.narration_text: You skip anyone who is neither cute nor kind.
beats.tts_normalized_text: You skip anyone who is neither cute nor kind.
beats.new_visual_element: red diagonal cutoff line sweeping in across the lower-left

build.suggested: suggested prompt: red diagonal cutoff line sweeping in across the lower-left

beats.narration_text: The whole bottom corner of the pool vanishes.
beats.tts_normalized_text: The whole bottom corner of the pool vanishes.
beats.new_visual_element: lower-left corner dots fade to near-white under light red hatching

build.suggested: suggested prompt: lower-left corner dots fade to near-white under light red hatching

beats.narration_text: Meanwhile the people who are both gorgeous and kind are busy skipping you.
beats.tts_normalized_text: Meanwhile the people who are both gorgeous and kind are busy skipping you.
beats.new_visual_element: second red diagonal cutoff line sweeping in across the upper-right

build.suggested: suggested prompt: second red diagonal cutoff line sweeping in across the upper-right

beats.narration_text: The golden top corner disappears too.
beats.tts_normalized_text: The golden top corner disappears too.
beats.new_visual_element: upper-right corner dots fade to near-white under light red hatching

build.suggested: suggested prompt: upper-right corner dots fade to near-white under light red hatching

beats.narration_text: What survives is a diagonal band from nice-but-plain down to hot-but-mean.
beats.tts_normalized_text: What survives is a diagonal band from nice-but-plain down to hot-but-mean.
beats.new_visual_element: soft accent-color halo tracing the surviving diagonal band

build.suggested: suggested prompt: soft accent-color halo tracing the surviving diagonal band

beats.narration_text: Look at the band by itself.
beats.tts_normalized_text: Look at the band by itself.
beats.new_visual_element: axes + band-only cloud redrawn as one composite (fresh white canvas)

build.suggested: suggested prompt: axes + band-only cloud redrawn as one composite (fresh white canvas)

beats.narration_text: A new trend line through the survivors tilts sharply downward.
beats.tts_normalized_text: A new trend line through the survivors tilts sharply downward.
beats.new_visual_element: downward-tilting trend line, accent color, drawn left to right

build.suggested: suggested prompt: downward-tilting trend line, accent color, drawn left to right

beats.narration_text: In your dating pool, hotter now really does mean meaner.
beats.tts_normalized_text: In your dating pool, hotter now really does mean meaner.
beats.new_visual_element: handwritten annotation 'in YOUR pool' with small arrow to the line

build.suggested: suggested prompt: handwritten annotation 'in YOUR pool' with small arrow to the line

beats.narration_text: But nobody's personality changed — your filters built that slope out of thin air.
beats.tts_normalized_text: But nobody's personality changed — your filters built that slope out of thin air.
beats.new_visual_element: the two red cutoff lines ghost back in at 40% opacity

build.suggested: suggested prompt: the two red cutoff lines ghost back in at 40% opacity

beats.narration_text: Statisticians call this trick Berkson's paradox.
beats.tts_normalized_text: Statisticians call this trick Berkson's paradox.
beats.new_visual_element: handwritten title label 'Berkson's paradox', underlined

build.suggested: suggested prompt: handwritten title label 'Berkson's paradox', underlined

beats.narration_text: Google once studied its own programming-contest stars.
beats.tts_normalized_text: Google once studied its own programming-contest stars.
beats.new_visual_element: napkin-sketch trophy with '{ }' engraved on the cup
beats.start_frame_prompt: Blank flat solid white background (#FFFFFF), completely empty canvas.
beats.end_frame_prompt: A small sports trophy with curly code brackets engraved on the cup, flat vector illustration. Thick black lines, solid colors, bold lines, simple details. White background. Napkin sketch style, simple doodle, black and white. --ar 16:9 --profile 2hu1pm2 j3xc8st i7dpdo9 8qzx41e 196d1wf
beats.video_animation_prompt: A minimalist, clean black line art illustration on a flat, solid white background (#FFFFFF). The black lines representing a small trophy with code brackets engraved on it draw themselves stroke-by-stroke onto the canvas with a smooth, consistent vector-style growth. The camera remains fixed. No hand, no pencil, no drawing tool is visible.
beats.negative_prompt: hand, fingers, arm, pencil, pen, marker, stylus, writing tool, shadow, paper texture, yellowing, gradient, photorealistic, 3D render, gray shading, color, brush, eraser, artifacts, distortion, camera movement, zoom, pan, wiggle, blur

build.suggested: suggested prompt: napkin-sketch trophy with '{ }' engraved on the cup

beats.narration_text: Among the people Google hired, contest wins predicted worse everyday performance.
beats.tts_normalized_text: Among the people Google hired, contest wins predicted worse everyday performance.
beats.new_visual_element: small hand-sketched scatter beside the trophy with a clearly downward trend line
beats.start_frame_prompt: A small sports trophy with curly code brackets engraved on the cup, flat vector illustration. Thick black lines, white background, napkin sketch style, black and white. --ar 16:9 --profile 2hu1pm2 j3xc8st i7dpdo9 8qzx41e 196d1wf
beats.end_frame_prompt: A small sports trophy with curly code brackets engraved on the cup on the left, and to its right a small hand-drawn scatter plot of dots with a single straight trend line sloping clearly downward from upper-left to lower-right, flat vector illustration. Thick black lines, simple details. White background. Napkin sketch style, simple doodle, black and white. --ar 16:9 --profile 2hu1pm2 j3xc8st i7dpdo9 8qzx41e 196d1wf
beats.video_animation_prompt: A minimalist, clean black line art illustration on a flat, solid white background (#FFFFFF). The black lines representing a small scatter plot of dots and one downward-sloping trend line draw themselves stroke-by-stroke onto the canvas with a smooth, consistent vector-style growth. All existing black line elements, including the trophy with code brackets, remain perfectly static, sharp, and locked in position. The camera remains fixed. No hand, no pencil, no drawing tool is visible.
beats.negative_prompt: hand, fingers, arm, pencil, pen, marker, stylus, writing tool, shadow, paper texture, yellowing, gradient, photorealistic, 3D render, gray shading, color, brush, eraser, artifacts, distortion, camera movement, zoom, pan, wiggle, blur

build.suggested: suggested prompt: small hand-sketched scatter beside the trophy with a clearly downward trend line

beats.narration_text: The hiring bar had already thrown away everyone who was weak at both.
beats.tts_normalized_text: The hiring bar had already thrown away everyone who was weak at both.
beats.new_visual_element: a single red diagonal cutoff line across the mini scatter's lower-left corner
beats.start_frame_prompt: A small sports trophy with curly code brackets engraved on the cup on the left, and a small hand-drawn scatter plot with a downward trend line on the right, flat vector illustration, thick black lines, white background, napkin sketch style. --ar 16:9 --profile 2hu1pm2 j3xc8st i7dpdo9 8qzx41e 196d1wf
beats.end_frame_prompt: A small sports trophy with curly code brackets on the left, and a small hand-drawn scatter plot with a downward trend line on the right, with one straight red diagonal line cutting across the scatter's lower-left corner, flat vector illustration. Thick black lines plus a single red line (#C0392B), simple details. White background. Napkin sketch style, simple doodle. --ar 16:9 --profile 2hu1pm2 j3xc8st i7dpdo9 8qzx41e 196d1wf
beats.video_animation_prompt: A minimalist, clean black line art illustration on a flat, solid white background (#FFFFFF). A single red line (#C0392B) representing a cutoff draws itself stroke-by-stroke across the lower-left of the small scatter plot with a smooth, consistent vector-style growth. All existing black line elements, including the trophy with code brackets and the scatter plot with its downward trend line, remain perfectly static, sharp, and locked in position. The camera remains fixed. No hand, no pencil, no drawing tool is visible.
beats.negative_prompt: hand, fingers, arm, pencil, pen, marker, stylus, writing tool, shadow, paper texture, yellowing, gradient, photorealistic, 3D render, gray shading, brush, eraser, artifacts, distortion, camera movement, zoom, pan, wiggle, blur

build.suggested: suggested prompt: a single red diagonal cutoff line across the mini scatter's lower-left corner

beats.narration_text: Any time a gate picks winners, the survivors show patterns the world never had.
beats.tts_normalized_text: Any time a gate picks winners, the survivors show patterns the world never had.
beats.new_visual_element: small gate/funnel sketch beneath, dots entering wide and exiting single-file
beats.start_frame_prompt: A small sports trophy with code brackets on the left, a small hand-drawn scatter plot with a downward trend line and one red diagonal cutoff line on the right, flat vector illustration, thick black lines, white background, napkin sketch style. --ar 16:9 --profile 2hu1pm2 j3xc8st i7dpdo9 8qzx41e 196d1wf
beats.end_frame_prompt: A small sports trophy with code brackets on the left, a small hand-drawn scatter plot with a downward trend line and one red diagonal cutoff line on the right, and below them a small funnel-shaped gate with many dots entering the wide top and a few dots exiting the narrow bottom, flat vector illustration. Thick black lines plus a single red line, simple details. White background. Napkin sketch style, simple doodle. --ar 16:9 --profile 2hu1pm2 j3xc8st i7dpdo9 8qzx41e 196d1wf
beats.video_animation_prompt: A minimalist, clean black line art illustration on a flat, solid white background (#FFFFFF). The black lines representing a small funnel-shaped gate with dots entering its wide top and a few dots leaving its narrow bottom draw themselves stroke-by-stroke onto the canvas with a smooth, consistent vector-style growth. All existing black line elements, including the trophy, the scatter plot, its trend line, and the red cutoff line, remain perfectly static, sharp, and locked in position. The camera remains fixed. No hand, no pencil, no drawing tool is visible.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: small gate/funnel sketch beneath, dots entering wide and exiting single-file

beats.narration_text: So before you trust a pattern, ask who got filtered out.
beats.tts_normalized_text: So before you trust a pattern, ask who got filtered out.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: So before you trust a pattern, ask who got filtered out.
